3. **Q2 budget review from Marcus (Finance)** — sent 2026-04-18, expected 2026-04-25. ~3 weeks stale. Worth a chase this week given the quarter is in motion.

No other registers (`decisions.md`, `observations.md`) or projects flag anything else outstanding — the followups file is the live list.

Want me to draft the chase messages, starting with the SOC2 escalation?
